extortion.description: Susquehanna Glass is a family-owned and operated business. Today,it flourishes under the leadership of third-generation owner Walt Rowen, the grandson of original partner, Walter Roye.We will upload 35gb of corporate data soon. Detailed personal information of almost 800 people (i-9 forms, scans of passports, DLs, SSNs, drug test ans so on), detailed financials, customer information, etc.
